title: Moroccan Mechoui Lamb
description: A traditional Moroccan dish made with slow-cooked lamb, flavored with aromatic spices and herbs.

ingredients.name: Moroccan spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Season the lamb shoulder with salt, pepper, and the Moroccan spice blend.
Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat and sear the lamb until browned on all sides.
Transfer the lamb to the preheated oven and cook for 2 1/2 to 3 hours, or until the meat is tender and falls apart easily.
While the lamb is cooking, prepare the couscous according to package instructions.
To serve, slice the lamb against the grain and serve with couscous, dates, and a sprinkle of parsley.
